comment: LLM generates code deltas to improve the trainable CaptionDecoder head.
prompt: Task: Generate a unified diff (delta) to improve the trainable CaptionDecoder head in the Blip2Fast model.
1. READ the baseline structure carefully. Note the [FROZEN] and [TRAINABLE] markers.
2. Only modify sections marked as [TRAINABLE] or [LLM_MODIFIABLE].
3. DO NOT change the FrozenBlip2Encoder class or its instantiation.
4. Improve the 'visual_projection' or the 'forward()' logic in the CaptionDecoder class.
5. Use REAL line numbers from the baseline code above.
+<your addition using baseline's actual variable names>
- Do NOT touch the [FROZEN] parts. These are hardware-frozen backbones.
- Ensure 'self.encoder.eval()' is preserved in the forward pass.
- Line numbers must match the actual baseline line numbers provided in <nn> tags.
- Focus on improving the mapping between visual features and GPT2 input space.
